attacking_style: Attempts extended solo efforts (5km+) from distance, but lacks power to sustain breakaways when peloton is organized. Attacks appear opportunistic rather than tactically timed.
team_tactics: Insufficient data to establish clear team support patterns. Solo attack suggests either limited domestique support or independent racing approach.
terrain_preference: Insufficient data to determine clear terrain preference. Struggled on finish with uphill component (final 2km), suggesting climbing may be a limiter.
vulnerability: Lacks power reserve to sustain extended solo efforts when facing organized peloton chase. Vulnerable when attacks require sustained high output over 5km+ without teammates.
key_patterns: Solo breakaway attempts absorbed by organized peloton, indicating threshold insufficient against coordinated chase
form_trajectory: unknown: Single 2017 observation shows failed attack, but insufficient data to establish trajectory trend
